actors.name: SAP SE
actors.role: enterprise software vendor and AI platform provider

career_trajectory: Founded 1972 as Systems, Applications and Products in Data Processing
Grew to become world's largest enterprise software company by revenue
Pivoted to cloud with SAP S/4HANA migration programme (2015–present)
Launched Business Data Cloud (BDC) in February 2025 with Databricks
key_experiences: S/4HANA cloud migration campaign and resulting customer friction
BDC partnership with Databricks to create unified enterprise data layer

strategic_style.decision_style: acquisition-led platform expansion with ecosystem alliances
strategic_style.value_proposition: unified enterprise AI platform combining SAP and non-SAP data for business AI
decision_preferences: bolt-on MDM and data integration capabilities via acquisition
deepen hyperscaler alliances (Databricks, Google Cloud, Microsoft Fabric)
position BDC as the enterprise AI data backbone
non_negotiables: maintaining ERP customer base trust during cloud migration
interoperability with major cloud data platforms
SAP One Domain Model consistency across application portfolio

actors.name: Reltio
actors.role: master data management and AI entity resolution provider (acquisition target)

actors.name: Databricks
actors.role: data lake and AI platform alliance partner underpinning BDC

actors.name: DSAG (German SAP User Group)
actors.role: representative body of SAP enterprise customers in DACH region

actors.name: Microsoft Fabric
actors.role: competing unified analytics and data integration platform

payload.name: SAP Business Data Cloud Launch
payload.description: SAP launched BDC in alliance with Databricks to unify enterprise data for AI

payload.name: DSAG BDC Awareness Research
payload.description: 83% of DSAG members unfamiliar or only slightly familiar with BDC

payload.name: SAP Acquires Reltio
payload.description: SAP announces acquisition of Reltio to integrate non-SAP data into its AI platform
payload.strategic_rationale: Extend BDC to harmonise external enterprise data using Reltio AI entity resolution

influences.label: AI entity resolution and golden record MDM capability
Data lake interoperability and hyperscaler distribution
Adoption trust deficit and migration friction pressure

query_skeleton.strategic_focus: BDC adoption acceleration via Reltio MDM integration
